name: luongndcoder
description: Self-hosted marketplace for opencode-plugin-cc — Claude Code orchestrating anomalyco/opencode with free models

plugins.name: opencode-plugin-cc
plugins.description: CC plans + reviews, OpenCode executes tasks with a free or cheap paid OpenCode Zen model (pick via /oc-model) and can use your Claude Code skills (/oc-skills). Install → model → plan → exec → verify with reviewer + retry + cancel. /oc-install bootstraps opencode.
